steps.title: Expand the function $f(x) = (2x - 5)^2$
steps.content:
Apply the binomial square pattern with $a = 2x$ and $b = 5$:
$$f(x) = (2x)^2 - 2(2x)(5) + 5^2 = 4x^2 - 20x + 25$$

steps.title: Add f(x) + g(x) and combine like terms
steps.content: $$f(x) + g(x) = (4x^2 - 20x + 25) + (4x + 14)$$ $$= 4x^2 + (-20x + 4x) + (25 + 14)$$ $$= 4x^2 - 16x + 39$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
